title: 'Valser Naturstein' quarzite
description: The MOVING reference member state of this VC (Value Chain) is SWITZERLAND 1. The reference MOVING Card ID of this VC is VC 27 CH1. The quartzite called 'Valser Naturstein' is characterised by a great compactness, has a dense structure and a pronounced frost resistance. It is traditionally used for roofing houses and is now in great demand among architects.
